creator: hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com
text:
Building japanese/p5-nkf fails because of possibly unnecessary patches since update of japanese/nkf to 2.1.0.

Fix: 

Removing files/*.
How-To-Repeat: # make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for ja-p5-nkf-2.1.0,1
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> MD5 Checksum OK for nkf-2.1.0.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for nkf-2.1.0.tar.gz.
===>   ja-p5-nkf-2.1.0,1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.1 - found
===>  Patching for ja-p5-nkf-2.1.0,1
===>   ja-p5-nkf-2.1.0,1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.1 - found
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ja-p5-nkf-2.1.0,1
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
3 out of 3 hunks ignored--saving rejects to NKF.xs.rej
=> Patch patch-NKF.xs failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/japanese/p5-nkf.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/japanese/p5-nkf.
